Stub functions for testing accelerometer service interactions in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This C header file declares functions related to an accelerometer service, which is likely part of a larger application. The functions include [`accel_service_state_init`](<#accel_service_state_init>), which initializes the state of the accelerometer service, and [`accel_data_service_subscribe`](<#accel_data_service_subscribe>) and [`accel_raw_data_service_subscribe`](<#accel_raw_data_service_subscribe>), which allow subscription to accelerometer data updates with specified sample rates and handlers. The [`accel_data_service_unsubscribe`](<#accel_data_service_unsubscribe>) function is used to unsubscribe from the accelerometer data service. Additionally, [`accel_service_private_get_session`](<#accel_service_private_get_session>) retrieves the session state for a given task, and [`accel_service_cleanup_task_session`](<#accel_service_cleanup_task_session>) cleans up the session associated with a task. The file includes a dependency on `accel_service_private.h`, indicating that it interacts with private components of the accelerometer service.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `applib/accel_service_private.h`
